creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Graham Perrin from comment #2)

> * shortcuts are _not_ effective if preceded by a click on the 
>   listing for an e-mail.

A simple workaround, whilst any listing is in focus: 

* precede the required shortcut with (change of focus) 
  use of the Tab key. 

I'll aim to make this reproducible in something other than FreeBSD. I do imagine an upstream bug.
